title: Reasonable Armor Durability│合理的盔甲耐久度
description: Interchange the max durability of all helmets and boots of the same material.│互換了同材質頭盔與靴子的最大耐久度。
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components).│該資料包需要伺服器端模組[物品組件](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components)。 ⚠️**
# Introduce│介紹
Why do boots require less material than helmets, but have a higher maximum durability? With this data pack, the max durability of helmets and boots will be swapped, which will improve the unreasonable situation.│憑什麼靴子的所需的材料比頭盔少，最大耐久度卻比頭盔高？有了這個資料包，頭盔與靴子的最大耐久度將會被互換，這樣子不合理的事情就得到了改善。
